seoTitle: Cambridge Park vs Camden — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cambridge Park and Camden. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cambridge Park vs Camden: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cambridge Park and Camden.
heading: Cambridge Park vs Camden — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cambridge Park, New South Wales and Camden, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Camden has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Cambridge Park (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cambridge Park or Camden safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cambridge Park has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Camden scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cambridge Park scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Camden scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cambridge Park or Camden?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Camden has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
